text:
* James Bailie (jimmy@mammothcheese.ca) wrote:

What do you think of also doing this:

---
-INSTALL_TARGET=STAGEDIR=../stage/ install
+DESTDIRNAME=	STAGEDIR
---

for cleaner stagedir support? (same for drood)
